title: Failure + Entropy Analysis
description: Phase 3 output — adversarial audit of the current design

bottlenecks.description: Where throughput or forward progress will collapse under real usage.

ambiguity_defects.description: Things that will require mid-build clarification if not resolved now.

token_explosion_risks.description: Prompts, contexts, or data flows that will exceed practical AI context limits.

orchestration_drift.description: Places where multiple agents or components will diverge or desync over time.

governance_failures.description: Points where authorization, ownership, or accountability is undefined.

overengineering_risks.description: Complexity that wasn't requested and won't be needed at MVP scale.

maintainability_risks.description: Design decisions that will be expensive to change in 6 months.

missing_implementation_detail.description: Gaps that prevent a builder from starting. Each one blocks the handoff until resolved.
